assessment.note: Reports being less motivated in team rituals lately — strong engagement dip, with mild drag on growth and energy; [THREAD-DEFERRED] team rituals disengagement noted but drill blocked by cap and under-served aspiration must be covered next.

new_queue.label: Direction
new_queue.name: When you imagine yourself eighteen months from now, what's actually different?
new_queue.description: Probes whether they have a real picture of where they want to go.

new_queue.label: Manager leverage
new_queue.name: What would you want more of from me to make the next stretch feel worth it?
new_queue.description: Elicits the kind of manager support that would help her re-engage and move forward.

new_queue.label: Close the loop
new_queue.name: Given what we've covered, what do you want to act on before we meet again?
new_queue.description: Ends with one concrete next move and keeps the conversation anchored in commitment.
